title: Mock vs Live Cost Divergence
hypothesis: MockLLMClient cost tracking is structurally identical to live API cost tracking — LLMResponse cost fields are the same, BudgetTracker processes them identically, and FinalResponse total_cost_usd reflects agent execution cost in both cases.

result.summary: Mock and live cost tracking are structurally identical — same LLMResponse fields, same BudgetTracker behaviour, same FinalResponse cost flow.
observations: LLMResponse contains cost_usd field in both mock and live paths.
BudgetTracker processes mock-sourced costs with same precision.
Agent cost flows to FinalResponse.total_cost_usd in 10/10 trials.
estimate_cost() scales proportionally with token count.
MockLLMClient implements the same interface as AnthropicClient.
Only difference between mock and live: source of cost value.
